hooks.command: find ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData -maxdepth 1 -name 'HappySpeech-*' -mtime +3 -exec rm -rf {} \; 2>/dev/null; find /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech/_workshop/screenshots -mtime +1 -type d -exec rm -rf {} \; 2>/dev/null; find /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech/_workshop/tmp -mtime +1 -type d -exec rm -rf {} \; 2>/dev/null; find /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech -name '*.bak' -not -path '*/.git/*' -exec rm -f {} \; 2>/dev/null; find /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech -name '.DS_Store' -not -path '*/.git/*' -delete 2>/dev/null; if [ -d /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech/build ]; then rm -rf /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech/build 2>/dev/null; fi; if [ -d /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech/functions/node_modules ]; then test $(find /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech/functions/node_modules -maxdepth 0 -mtime +7 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -gt 0 && rm -rf /Users/antongric/Yandex.Disk.localized/xcode_projects/Диплом/HappySpeech/functions/node_modules 2>/dev/null; fi; true
